resources.title: School notice handling
resources.guidance: Check the permission slip, payment amount, due date, student name, and required guardian signature. Do not send student identifiers in an unredacted message.

resources.title: Invoice validation
resources.guidance: Verify vendor identity, invoice number, amount, due date, and payment instructions before paying or replying.

resources.title: Utility notice risk
resources.guidance: Prioritize notices mentioning shutoff, disconnect, late fees, or payment arrangements. Confirm the balance directly through a trusted channel.

resources.title: Appointment preparation
resources.guidance: Confirm date, time, location, documents to bring, cancellation rules, and contact method.

resources.title: Sensitive intake forms
resources.guidance: Minimize sensitive details in messages. Ask for secure submission methods before sending IDs, income records, or medical details.

resources.title: General document triage
resources.guidance: Identify sender, deadline, requested action, consequence, contact channel, and any sensitive data before drafting a response.
